title: portulaca elongata var. pedicellata
intro: Portulaca elongata var. pedicellata, also known as the creeping portulaca or pedicellate portulaca, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Portulaca elongata var. pedicellata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, tincture, or poultice, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
